sqlMap.select:
select type_id, used from tbl_journal_form_type where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId#
and used = #used#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_journal_form ( type_id, company_id, tenant_id, form_content, form_content2, form_content3, form_content4, form_content5, form_content6, form_name, form_info, form_status, form_date ) SELECT #typeId# AS type_id, #companyId# AS company_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, f.form_content, f.form_content2, f.form_content3, f.form_content4, f.form_content5, f.form_content6, f.form_name, f.form_info, f.form_status, UTC_TIMESTAMP() FROM tbl_journal_form f WHERE f.company_id = 'Top' AND f.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND f.type_id = #typeId# AND f.form_status = 'basic'
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_form_type where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form_type set used=#used# where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_info, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.form_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as form_date, a.form_writer, a.form_status, a.type_id, b.dept_id, ifnull(CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END, (select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END from tbl_deptmaster dd where dd.CN = #companyId# and dd.tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) as dept_name, a.form_lang from tbl_journal_form a left join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and b.dept_id in (select CN from tbl_deptmaster)) left join tbl_deptmaster d on (d.CN = b.dept_id and d.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) where a.type_id = #typeId# and a.company_id = #companyId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.form_del_flag is null order by a.form_id desc, d.DISPLAYNAME2 d.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEmpty: select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_status, a.type_id from tbl_journal_form a join tbl_journal_form_type b on (a.company_id = b.company_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.type_id = b.type_id) where b.used = 'use' and a.form_status = 'basic' and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.company_id = #companyId# and form_del_flag is null
select.isNotEmpty:
select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_status, a.type_id, case when form_status = 'basic' then 0 else 1 end as orderNo from tbl_journal_form a left join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) join tbl_deptmaster d on (d.TENANT_ID = a.tenant_id and d.cn = #deptId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = a.company_id) where (b.dept_id = #deptId# or b.dept_id is null)
and a.type_id = #typeId#
and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.form_del_flag is null order by orderNo, form_id

sqlMap.select: select b.dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name from tbl_deptmaster a join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on a.CN = b.dept_id where b.form_id = #formId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId# and b.dept_id in (select CN from tbl_deptmaster) order by dept_name asc

select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1 is null
or d.CN = #companyId#
,'##', d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and not((d.extensionattribute1 is null or d.extensionattribute1 = '') and d.cn <> d.extensionattribute2)
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME2 d.DISPLAYNAME

select d.CN as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS companyName, case d.CN when #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) and d.extensionattribute2 = d.CN order by lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME2 d.DISPLAYNAME

select a.user_id as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.TITLE2 ELSE u.TITLE END AS jikwi, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN du.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE du.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, group_concat(CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END order by 1 separator '%') as auth_dept from tbl_usermaster u inner join tbl_journal_auth a on (u.CN = a.user_id and u.TENANT_ID = a.tenant_id and a.dept_id in (select CN from tbl_deptmaster)) inner join tbl_deptmaster d on (a.dept_id = d.CN and a.tenant_id = d.TENANT_ID) inner join tbl_deptmaster du on (du.CN = u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID = du.TENANT_ID) where a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# group by user_id

select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'no' as mine from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_journal_auth a on (d.CN = a.dept_id and a.tenant_id = d.TENANT_ID) where a.user_id = #userId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #userCompany# union select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'yes' as mine from tbl_deptmaster d inner join tbl_usermaster u on (d.CN = u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) where u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #userCompany# union select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'add' as mine from tbl_deptmaster d right join tbl_addjobmaster a on (d.CN = a.deptid and a.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) where a.CN = #userId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #userCompany# order by dept_name

select * from (select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TITLE2 ELSE TITLE END AS jikwi, MAIL as mail, DEPARTMENT as dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DESCRIPTION2 ELSE DESCRIPTION END AS dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'user' as userType from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DEPARTMENT = #value#
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
union all select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, A.CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS jikwi, A.MAIL as mail, B.DEPTID as dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'addJob' as userType from tbl_addjobmaster B join tbl_usermaster A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID join tbl_deptmaster C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID where B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
B.DEPTID = #value#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
) AA ORDER BY 8 ASC, 1 ASC LIMIT #curPage#, #pageSize#

select count(*) AS count from (select CN as user_id from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DEPARTMENT = #value#
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
union all select A.CN as user_id from tbl_addjobmaster B join tbl_usermaster A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID join tbl_deptmaster C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID where B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
B.DEPTID = #value#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
) AA

select form_id, form_name, form_info,
form_content,
form_content2 AS form_content,
form_content3 AS form_content,
form_content4 AS form_content,
form_content5 AS form_content,
form_content6 AS form_content,
form_content,
form_status, type_id from tbl_journal_form where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and form_id = #formId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set type_id = #typeId#, form_name = #formName#, form_info = #formDescript#, form_content = #formContent# where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_form_use_dept where form_id = #formId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set form_del_flag = 'Y' where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_auth ( user_id, dept_id, tenant_id ) select #userId#, #deptId#, #tenantId# from dual where not exists ( select DISPLAYNAME from tbl_usermaster where CN = #userId# and DEPARTMENT = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# )
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_auth where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select count(j.journal_id) from tbl_journal_recv r inner join tbl_journal j on (r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) where r.user_id = #userId# and r.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and r.recv_status='Y' and j.journal_writer in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) and isnull(r.recieve_date) and NULLIF(j.journal_status ,'') is null

select count(j.journal_id) as totalCount from tbl_journal j inner join tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id = f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join tbl_deptmaster d on (j.journal_dept = d.CN and d.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id) inner join tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer = u.CN and u.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id)
left join tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id = j.journal_id and j.tenant_id = r.tenant_id)
where j.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.company_id = #companyId#
and f.type_id = #typeId#
and j.journal_writer = #journalWriter#
and d.CN = #deptId#
and r.user_id = #recvUser# and r.recv_status = 'Y'
and j.journal_status = #status#
and NULLIF(j.journal_status,'') is null
and f.form_id = #formId#
and CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END like concat('%', #writerName#, '%')
and j.journal_title like concat('%', #journalTitle#, '%')
and j.journal_text like concat('%', #journalText#, '%')
and f.form_name like concat('%', #formName#, '%')
and (date(j.journal_date) between #startDate# and #endDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #startDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #endDate#)
and dept_share = 'Y'

select j.journal_id as journal_id, j.journal_title as journal_title, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(j.journal_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as journal_date, j.dept_share as dept_share, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as writer_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END as dept_name, f.form_name as form_name, f.type_id as type_id, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_reply jr where jr.journal_id = j.journal_id and jr.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as reply_count, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_file jf where jf.journal_id = j.journal_id and jf.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as file_count, (select count(*) from (select user_id, journal_id, TENANT_ID from tbl_journal_view v union select user_id, journal_id, TENANT_ID from tbl_journal_recv where recieve_date is not null) v where not(v.user_id = j.journal_writer) and v.journal_id = j.journal_id and v.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as view_count, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as total_recv, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and r.recieve_date is not null) as check_recv, ifnull( (ifnull( (select recieve_date as is_view from tbl_journal_recv where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = j.tenant_id and journal_id = j.journal_id ), (select view_date as is_view from tbl_journal_view where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = j.tenant_id and journal_id = j.journal_id ))), 'noView') as is_view , f.form_status as form_status, j.journal_sum as journal_sum, if(j.journal_writer = #userId#, 'Y', 'N') as mine from tbl_journal j inner join tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id = f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id and f.type_id = #typeId# )
inner join tbl_deptmaster d on (j.journal_dept = d.CN and d.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id and d.CN = #deptId# ) inner join tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer = u.CN and u.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id)
left join tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id)
where j.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.company_id = #companyId#
and j.journal_writer = #journalWriter#
and r.user_id = #recvUser# and r.recv_status = 'Y'
and j.journal_status = #status#
and NULLIF(j.journal_status,'') is null
and f.form_id = #formId#
and CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END like concat('%',#writerName#,'%')
and j.journal_title like concat('%',#journalTitle#,'%')
and j.journal_text like concat('%',#journalText#,'%')
and f.form_name like concat('%',#formName#,'%')
and (date(j.journal_date) between #startDate# and #endDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #startDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #endDate#)
and dept_share = 'Y'
group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,14,15,16,17
order by 3 desc
order by 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 10 11 12 14 16 desc
limit #startCount#, #listCnt#

select favorite_id, favorite_name, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(favorite_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as favorite_date from tbl_journal_recv_favorite where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by favorite_id asc

select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, a.CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.TITLE2 ELSE a.TITLE END AS jikwi, a.MAIL as mail, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE a.DESCRIPTION END AS dept_name from tbl_usermaster a join tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.favorite_id = #favoriteId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_recv_favorite set favorite_name = #favoriteName# where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_recv_favorite where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(e.list_cnt,20) as list_cnt, ifnull(e.viewenv,'NONE') as viewenv, ifnull(e.recv_alert,'Y') as recv_alert, ifnull(e.reply_alert,'Y') as reply_alert, ifnull(e.preview_wcontent,'50') as preview_wcontent, ifnull(e.preview_hcontent,'50') as preview_hcontent, u.mail as mail, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END AS name from tbl_usermaster u left join tbl_journal_env e on (u.CN = e.user_id and u.tenant_id = e.tenant_id) where u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_journal_env (user_id, tenant_id
,list_cnt
,viewenv
,reply_alert
,recv_alert
,preview_wcontent
,preview_hcontent
) VALUES (#userId#, #tenantId#
,#listCnt#
,#viewenv#
,#replyAlert#
,#recvAlert#
,#previewWcontent#
,#previewHcontent#
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = #userId#
,list_cnt = #listCnt#
,viewenv = #viewenv#
,reply_alert = #replyAlert#
,recv_alert = #recvAlert#
,preview_wcontent = #previewWcontent#
,preview_hcontent = #previewHcontent#
sqlMap.select: select a.form_id from tbl_journal a join tbl_journal_form b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) join tbl_deptmaster d on (d.TENANT_ID = a.tenant_id and d.cn = a.journal_dept) where a.journal_writer = #userId# and b.type_id = #typeId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# and b.form_del_flag is null order by a.journal_id desc limit 1
select user_id from tbl_journal_recv where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId#

insert.isEmpty: insert into tbl_journal_view (user_id, tenant_id, journal_id, view_date) values (#userId#, #tenantId#, #journalId#, #viewDate#) on duplicate key update tenant_id = #tenantId#
insert.isNotEmpty: update tbl_journal_recv set recieve_date = #viewDate# where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId# and recieve_date is null

sqlMap.select: select j.journal_id as journal_id, j.journal_title as journal_title, j.journal_content as journal_content, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(j.journal_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as journal_date, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as writer_name, f.form_name as form_name, f.type_id as type_id, j.journal_sum as journal_sum, (select count(jr.reply_id) from tbl_journal_reply jr where jr.journal_id = j.journal_id and jr.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and jr.reply_writer in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)) as reply_count, (select count(r.user_id) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and r.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)) as total_recv, (select count(r.recieve_date) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and r.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)) as check_recv, f.form_id as form_id, j.dept_share as dept_share, jf.file_path as file_path, jf.file_size as file_size, jf.file_name as file_name, case u.CN when #userId# then 'yes' else 'no' end as mine, u.CN as writer_id, u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_image, f.form_status from tbl_journal j inner join tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id = f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer = u.CN and u.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id) left join tbl_journal_file jf on (jf.journal_id = j.journal_id and jf.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) where j.tenant_id = #tenantId# and j.journal_id = #journalId#
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_journal set journal_title = #title#, form_id = #formId#, dept_share = #deptShare#, journal_content = #content#
,journal_status = "" ,journal_date = #writeDate#
,journal_date = #writeDate# ,journal_dept = #deptId#
where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_file where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal_recv where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_recv set recv_status = 'N' where user_id = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select r.reply_id as reply_id, r.reply_content as reply_content, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(r.reply_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as reply_date, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as reply_writer_name, u.CN as reply_writer, case u.CN when #userId# then 'Y' else 'N' end as mine from tbl_journal_reply r inner join tbl_usermaster u on (u.CN = r.reply_writer and u.TENANT_ID = r.tenant_id) where r.journal_id = #journalId# and r.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_journal_reply( tenant_id, reply_content, journal_id, reply_date, reply_writer ) values( #tenantId#, #replyContent#, #journalId#, #replyDate#, #userId# )
select journal_writer from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_reply where tenant_id = #tenantId# and reply_id = #replyId# and reply_writer = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId#
sqlMap.select: select count(b.user_id) as recvCount from tbl_usermaster a inner join tbl_journal_recv b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.journal_id = #journalId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and b.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)

select b.user_id as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME END as user_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE a.DESCRIPTION END as dept_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.TITLE2 ELSE a.TITLE END as jikwi, ifnull(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.recieve_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '-') as date from tbl_usermaster a join tbl_journal_recv b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.journal_id = #journalId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and b.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) order by lpad(ifnull(a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME END
limit #startCount#, #listCnt#

select count(us.user_id) as view_count from ( select u.cn as user_id from tbl_journal_view v inner join tbl_usermaster u on(v.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID and u.CN = v.user_id) where v.journal_id = #journalId# and v.tenant_id = #tenantId# and not(v.user_id = (select journal_writer from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))
) us

select u.cn as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as user_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE u.DESCRIPTION END as dept_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.TITLE2 ELSE u.TITLE END as jikwi, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(v.view_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as date from tbl_journal_view v inner join tbl_usermaster u on(v.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID and u.CN = v.user_id) where v.journal_id = #journalId# and v.tenant_id = #tenantId# and v.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) and not(v.user_id = (select journal_writer from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)) order by 5 desc limit #startCount#, #listCnt#

select count(r.user_id) as count, case when j.journal_id = #journalId# and j.journal_writer in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) then 'Y' else 'N' end as is_live, case when r.user_id = #userId# then 'Y' else 'N' end as check_susin from tbl_journal j left join tbl_journal_recv r on(j.journal_id = r.journal_id and j.tenant_id = r.tenant_id and r.user_id = #userId#) where j.journal_id = #journalId# and j.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select journal_content, journal_title from tbl_journal where tenant_id = #tenantId# and journal_id in
#journalIdS[]#

select d.CN as id, '##' as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case d.CN when (select dept_id from tbl_journal_auth where tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id=#userId# and dept_id = d.CN) then 'Y' else 'N' end as isComp, case d.CN when (select department from tbl_usermaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId#) then 'yes' when (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId# and deptid = d.CN) then 'add' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END

select d.CN as id, d.extensionattribute1 as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case d.CN when (select dept_id from tbl_journal_auth where tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId# and dept_id = d.CN) then 'Y' else 'N' end as isComp, case d.CN when (select department from tbl_usermaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId#) then 'yes' when (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId# and deptid = d.CN) then 'add' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%,', #deptId#, ',%') ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_auth where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and dept_id = #deptId#
sqlMap.select:
select u.mail as mail,
u.DISPLAYNAME as name
u.DISPLAYNAME2 as name
from tbl_usermaster u where u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set form_lang = #form_lang# where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and form_status = 'basic'
sqlMap.select: select form_lang from tbl_journal_form where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select form_lang from tbl_journal_form where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and type_id = 'ezJournal.t05' and form_status = 'basic' limit 1
